summary: Primary tracked state packet for the Codex-only complete-issue multi-agent demo. Records directly observed parallel hosted Codex worker-lane outputs with disjoint ownership and preserves serialized downstream gates as not yet fully proven.

notes: This state packet records repository-relative evidence only.
The current branch now contains directly inspected outputs from worker A, worker B, and worker C on disjoint owned file sets.
A focused proving command for the documentary fixture was executed locally, but downstream reviewer publication, janitor routing, merge, and closeout are still not claimed as complete.

parallelized_capabilities: disjoint hosted Codex worker-lane execution on the live issue surface
lane-local artifact authorship under explicit file ownership constraints
parallel production of code/demo, proof packet, and milestone-evidence surfaces
serialized_gates: conductor admission and lifecycle routing truth
reviewer publication and synthesis across worker-owned artifacts
closeout reconciliation across SRP, SOR, and issue state
milestone-level publication claims outside the issue-local proof packet
reviewer_expectations: Verify that at least two hosted Codex worker lanes produced concrete issue-local outputs on disjoint paths.
Verify that no lane edited outside its owned file set.
Verify that reviewer findings or explicit non-findings were recorded on the produced diffs or artifacts.
Verify whether janitor routing was unnecessary or was truthfully executed as a serialized step.
Verify that closeout truth lands on canonical issue-local review/output surfaces before classifying the proof as proven.
truth_notes: This packet intentionally distinguishes directly observed worker outputs from downstream serialized gates that remain unresolved.
The current classification remains conservative because complete end-to-end issue closure is not directly evidenced here.
